summary: Retain one representative smoke-attribution claim and defer broader channel expansion.

curated_claims.summary: Public posts claim Chiang Mai smoke worsened on 2026-03-19 due to nearby burning.
curated_claims.statement: Public discussion asserts that smoke in Chiang Mai worsened on 2026-03-19 and attributes the episode to nearby or upwind burning.
curated_claims.meaning: This is the dominant public attribution narrative worth testing against physical evidence.
curated_claims.selection_reason: Merged duplicate public posts into one retained smoke-attribution claim.

open_questions: Should the next round add more local-language discussion sources?

recommended_next_actions.objective: Check whether PM2.5 and hotspot observations corroborate the March 19 smoke attribution window.
recommended_next_actions.reason: Physical corroboration is still required before matching.
